# Ali Bińkowska

> Solopreneur, Product Manager, AI Trainer and occasional AI Engineer based in Poland. Helping founders with OKRs, metrics and dashboards. Works in Polish and English.

## Roles

- Solopreneur and Product Manager at Nexi8 (https://nexi8.pl) - OKR sprints, metrics definition, Data Studio dashboards for founders and business owners
- Occasional AI Engineer - OCR, bots and chatbot projects in Python
- AI Trainer at PAAI (https://paai.pl/o-nas) - training teams and individuals to work smarter with AI tools
- Guest Lecturer at WSKZ (https://studia-online.pl/kadra/0/1417/mgr_alina_binkowska) - AI, product thinking, building with modern technology

## Expertise

OKR frameworks, business metrics, data visualization, Data Studio (Google), AI tools, product management, Python, n8n automation, chatbots, OCR

## Tools

Claude Code, Gemini, Python, Data Studio (Google), Canva, Letterly, Descript, Lovable, Supabase, n8n, make,

## Credentials

- Machine Learning DevOps Engineer Nanodegree - Udacity
- Deep Learning Nanodegree - Udacity
- AI for Business Leaders - Udacity
- Multiple courses on DeepLearning.ai platform
- Product Manager Academy by nerds.family & Relativity
- Business Foundations Specialisation - The Wharton School
- Leadership Enrichment & Acceleration Program
